articles.title: Weather Today [01 April, 2026]: Check IMD Rain Predictions, Snow Alert, Thunderstorms & Heat Across Delhi NCR, Mumbai, Chennai, Karnataka, Rajasthan, Jammu, Ahmedabad, Punjab, Hyderabad, Uttar Pradesh - The Sunday Guardian
articles.full_text:
Weather Today, 01 April 2026: Weather patterns across India are being driven by active western disturbances and cyclonic circulations, creating a stark divide. The India Meteorological Department (IMD) has issued alerts for heavy rainfall, thunderstorms with gusty winds reaching 60–75 km/h in northern and central India, while southern and western states brace for rising heat stress. Northern hills may witness fresh snowfall, and a temporary 2–4°C drop in temperatures is expected in parts of the northwest.
Will it Rain or Snow in the Hills?
Northern hill regions including Jammu & Kashmir and Himachal Pradesh may witness light to moderate snowfall at higher altitudes. Rainfall is expected in lower valleys due to moisture-laden winds and western disturbance activity. Temperatures remain low, with Srinagar ranging between 2°C and 9°C, increasing the chances of fog and reduced visibility in mountainous areas.
How Will Weather Take Turn in North Indian Cities?
North India is expected to experience unstable weather with intermittent rain and thunderstorms. A temporary cooling of 2–4°C may occur due to rainfall and gusty winds, particularly in Delhi NCR, Punjab, Haryana, and Uttar Pradesh. However, warm nights with above-normal minimum temperatures are expected in some areas.
Delhi-NCR Weather Today
Minimum: 22°C | Maximum: 33°C
Delhi-NCR will experience generally cloudy skies with intermittent light rain and thunderstorms. Gusty winds reaching up to 60 km/h may develop later in the day, providing relief from rising temperatures. Air quality remains in the Moderate category (AQI ~92–102).
Chennai Weather Today
Minimum: 26°C | Maximum: 33°C
Chennai is expected to remain hot and humid with partly cloudy skies. Thunderstorms accompanied by lightning may occur in isolated pockets. Coastal winds may provide mild relief from humidity.
Mumbai Weather Today
Minimum: 27°C | Maximum: 29°C
Mumbai will see stable coastal weather conditions. Humidity remains high with a light sea breeze throughout the day. No significant rainfall is expected, though cloud cover may increase.
Hyderabad Weather Today
Minimum: 26°C | Maximum: 36°C
Hyderabad will experience hot daytime temperatures, with maximums potentially hitting 37–38°C. Isolated thunderstorms may develop in the evening hours, bringing temporary cooling.
Karnataka Weather Today
Minimum: 24°C | Maximum: 32°C
Parts of Karnataka, including Bengaluru, may experience scattered thunderstorms with cloudy skies and light rainfall. Humidity remains moderate.
Uttar Pradesh Weather Today
Minimum: 25°C | Maximum: 37°C
Lucknow and surrounding areas will experience rising temperatures with partly cloudy skies. Thunderstorms and gusty winds may develop later in the day, with some districts seeing heavy rainfall.
Rajasthan Weather Today
Minimum: 23°C | Maximum: 34°C
Jaipur and nearby areas will experience warm daytime weather. Winds may intensify in the afternoon, and isolated thunderstorm activity is possible under partly cloudy skies.
Jammu and Kashmir Weather Today
Minimum: 1°C | Maximum: 7°C
Srinagar may witness cold conditions with chances of snowfall at higher elevations. Light rain may occur in valley areas, with reduced visibility expected.
Punjab Weather Today
Minimum: 21°C | Maximum: 33°C
Chandigarh and surrounding areas may experience thunderstorms and gusty winds between April 1–2. Weather is expected to be cloudy with strong winds that may disrupt travel.
Ahmedabad Weather Today
Minimum: 26°C | Maximum: 39°C
Ahmedabad will experience very hot and dry weather conditions. Heat levels may intensify during afternoon hours with clear skies, and residents are advised to stay hydrated.
Full City-Wise Rain Forecast Across Major Indian Cities
How Will Rising Temperatures Impact Today?
Rising temperatures across central, western, and southern India may increase heat discomfort during afternoon hours. While northern plains receive temporary relief from rain, heatwave-like conditions are expected in parts of Odisha, West Bengal, Tamil Nadu, and Andhra Pradesh. Authorities advise staying hydrated and limiting outdoor exposure between 12 PM and 4 PM.
Delhi NCR Weekly Weather Forecast
Delhi’s Air Quality Today – April 1, 2026
Delhi’s AQI is expected to remain in the Moderate category (AQI ~92–102). Recent rainfall and increased wind movement have helped improve air quality, though localized pockets in NCR may still experience higher pollution levels.

FAQ’s: Weather Today Update
Q. Are there any travel or safety warnings?
A. Yes, thunderstorms and gusty winds (up to 60–75 km/h) may disrupt travel in northern and central India. Residents are advised to stay indoors and avoid open fields or trees during lightning.
Q. Will temperatures rise across the country?
A. Temperatures are expected to rise in central, western, and southern India, especially in Gujarat, Maharashtra, and Andhra Pradesh. Northern plains will see a temporary drop due to rain.
Q. Will there be any rain today?
A. Yes, rainfall is expected in northern India (Delhi, Punjab, Uttar Pradesh), southern states (Karnataka, Tamil Nadu), and northern hills. Central India may see isolated showers.
Q. Where will it snow today?
A. Higher regions of Jammu and Kashmir and Himachal Pradesh may receive fresh snowfall.
Q. Which cities will experience heat today?
A. Ahmedabad, Hyderabad, Lucknow, Chennai, and parts of Uttar Pradesh may experience warmer daytime conditions with heat stress.
Disclaimer: Weather forecasts are for guidance only. Conditions may change rapidly. Always check local authorities for emergencies and travel alerts.
